creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Simple bump of portrevision:

Tools/scripts/bump-revision.sh audio/gogglesmm

leads to:

audio/gogglesmm: PORTREVISION not found, adding PORTREVISION=1

and:

-rw-r--r--    1 root  wheel     36 Sep 21 19:10 Makefile

The Makefile previously was:

-rw-r--r--    1 root  wheel   4127 Sep 21 18:48 Makefile

Any ideas on why this happens ?
